infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: PlateIQ uses the camera to scan barcodes, food labels, and your plate to analyse nutrition on-device.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: PlateIQ reads photos of food labels and meals so it can decode ingredients on-device.

web.name: PlateIQ
web.description: On-device AI that demystifies food labels and plates. Free, private, runs anywhere.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow PlateIQ to use the camera to scan food labels and plates.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow PlateIQ to access your photos to analyse food labels.
